assumptions: All components run in the same Go process for simplicity.
The queue is a simple in-memory channel-based queue.
The store is a thread-safe in-memory map protected by a sync.RWMutex.
constraints: Must be implementable as a single Go module.
No cloud services or external databases.
All communication is via direct function calls (no network).
The system must handle concurrent requests safely.
success_criteria: API can accept and enqueue tasks.
Worker processes tasks from the queue.
Processed results are stored and retrievable.
System handles concurrent API calls without data races.

test_cases.name: TestEnqueueAndProcess
test_cases.description: Enqueue a task and verify worker processes it and stores result.

test_cases.name: TestConcurrentAccess
test_cases.description: Simulate multiple concurrent API calls and verify no data races.

test_cases.name: TestQueueEmpty
test_cases.description: Verify worker handles empty queue gracefully.
